deviations.what: the SEP_CHANGE round-trip (which read a private UI5-internal event path) was removed 2026-07-16 - selectedKey and separatorStyle share one two-way bound path, so the separator switches client-side. Confirm the instant separator change in a running system. NOTE: an earlier version of this port WAS live-checked 2026-07-15 (the ${$source>/text} event arg delivered the clicked link's text), but that check predates this rework, so the checked status was reset 2026-07-19 per the checked-invalidation rule (AGENTS.md §10) - re-verify and restamp.
